text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The year-end Arima Kinen is here. Yaeno Muteki
is running as well, having been voted in second by
the fans, just behind Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's no surprise Yaeno Muteki got second in the
vote! She's gone toe-to-toe against the Eternal
Top Three time and time again. And she's cool to
boot! Glad she's getting her dues!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I saw her at one of Ogurin's races, and she got me
hook, line, and sinker! I'm a fan through and
through now!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of Oguri Cap, doesn't she seem a bit off
lately? I wonder if something happened to her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap certainly hasn't been racing like
normal these days.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oguriiiiin! You can do it! Gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Ogurin didn't seem to have her usual edge
today...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Do you think she's sick? Maybe she's not eating
well.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what happened either... I wonder what's
wrong...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She should rest if she's not feeling well. I'd... well,
I'd rather not watch her race if she's in pain, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Oguri Cap still won the popularity poll
for the Arima Kinen. Clearly, many of her fans still
expect a lot from her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Yaeno Muteki also wants to run against
Oguri Cap, who has been dubbed the Beast.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It may not be the main event, but that's no excuse
to look sloppy. We have to put our best foot
forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, all of the Arima Kinen competitors are
attending a greeting session as a way of
interacting with the fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone will head out onto the turf and give a
brief but heartfelt introduction.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hello, Oguri. Good luck today!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, right... You too...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oguri had her head hung the whole time.
choice_data_list: It might be because she's been in a slump.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But if she keeps this up...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This year's Arima Kinen entrants have taken to
the turf!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yaeno Muteki! I'm rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Don't hold back, Yaeno Muteki!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text: Run like your old self, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oguriiin! You got this! I believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Next up is our runner-up in the popularity poll
and the winner of the autumn Tenno Sho... Yaeno
Muteki!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Nice, Yaeno Muteki! You look ready to go
already!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And now, thanks to the support of her many,
many fans—introducing the winner of the fan
vote... Oguri Cap!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah! Oguriiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text:
O-GU-RI!
O-GU-RI!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Aaah... AAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: HRRRYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Yaeno Muteki has suddenly taken
off at full speed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter, chatter!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's run all the way to the fourth corner! Oh!
She's turning around! She's coming back!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Y-Yaeno?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Finally... You've finally picked up your head.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You take the support of the public and turn it
into power!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That's your strength!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If you hang your head and close yourself off to
those around you, you won't be able to use that
strength!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: How do you intend to beat me like that?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Me! Yaeno Muteki! At the height of my
power!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Don't close yourself off! Listen to all the voices
crying out for you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Turn that support into power and run!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That's all I want to say.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oguriiiin! Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text: You can win, Oguri! I know you can!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Everyone...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's right.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can hear your voices. I can feel your support and
warmth, filling up the void inside of me...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And I will answer you all, just watch and see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap looks up toward the stands and waves
vigorously at her supporters.
